creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 212162
gh-0.6.1.diff

Changes:
	* Bump DISTVERSION to 0.6.1, update distinfo and GH_TUPLE
	  dependency list;
	* Whilst here, prefix BUILD_DATE/BUILD_VERSION with '_' and
          move accordingly to keep portclippy from complaining.

Testing:
	* No errors reported with portlint, built in Poudriere and
	  application works as expected (logs attached).
